title: AI skills for the UK workforce
body: "This report has been co-developed by Skills England, however, the opinions expressed in this report are those of the author and do not necessarily reflect the views of Skills England.  The aims of this report are to:   analyse artificial intelligence (AI) upskilling needs, barriers and opportunities in 10 key growth sectors identify common barriers to AI skills development that impact organisations of all sizes introduce a set of AI skills tools to help employers and training providers   "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
